chunks.text: Compact Device Technologies for Compact Integrated Systems (EECS-2025-35) by Lars Tatum. Low Thermal Budget Process Engineering for Flexible Electronics, Sensors, and Nanoscale Patterning (EECS-2021-225) by Thomas Rembert and Tsu-Jae King Liu. Evaluation of Scaled Segmented Channel MOSFETs for Analog/RF Applications (EECS-2020-84) by Lars Tatum.
chunks.question: What are the titles and authors of the technical reports from 2025 to 2020?
chunks.answer: Compact Device Technologies by Lars Tatum.

chunks.text: 2-D Materials: Low Power Electronics and Novel Device Possibilities (EECS-2019-13) by Varun Mishra. Cell Geometry Impact on the Cell Filling Process in Gravure Printing for Printed Electronics (EECS-2018-165) by Xiaoer Hu. Novel Technologies for Next Generation Memory (EECS-2013-136) by WookHyun Kwon.
chunks.question: Which reports cover 2-D materials, cell geometry, and next generation memory?
chunks.answer: Reports by Varun Mishra, Xiaoer Hu, WookHyun Kwon.

chunks.text: Advanced MOSFET Designs and Implications for SRAM Scaling (EECS-2012-50) by Changhwan Shin. Convex Channel Design for Improved Capacitorless DRAM Retention Time (EECS-2009-147) by Min Hee Cho, Changhwan Shin and Tsu-Jae King Liu.
chunks.question: What are the advanced MOSFET and DRAM-related reports?
chunks.answer: Advanced MOSFET Designs and Convex Channel Design.
